MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:39 am and concluding at 10:47 am.

Plaintiff Ruth Reynozo is present represented by Sean Fisher, Esq. and placed under oath.
Defendant Maria Reynozo not appearing.

The Court finds that the Proof of service of the first amended complaint is insufficient.

Good cause appearing, the matter is continued to March 26, 2025 at 9:00 am in Dept 505, to allow plaintiff time to serve the first amended complaint.
